properties.displayName: Scheduled task created with suspicious image / encoded args
properties.description: schtasks.exe /create or Microsoft-Windows-TaskScheduler EventID 4698 with LOLBin actions.
properties.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where NewProcessName endswith "\schtasks.exe"
| where CommandLine has "/create"
| where CommandLine has_any ("powershell","cmd.exe","rundll32","-enc","FromBase64",
                              "\Users\Public", "\AppData\")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, CommandLine,
          ParentProcessName, NewProcessName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
